reason: ADR records correctly trace design decisions to SRS FR/NFR requirements. ADR-001 (stdlib-only) satisfies NFR-06 deployability. ADR-002 (single flat src/taskq/ directory) justifies CRG community density target. Alternatives considered and consequences documented per standard ADR format.
citations: ADR-001 — Python 3.11 stdlib-only decision maps to NFR-06 (deployability) and NFR-05 (no supply-chain risk)
ADR-002 — single flat directory design maps to CRG cohesion requirement (≥0.3 internal-edge density)
